title: Team member closeout: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) — boundary-scoped closeout for Lunary (incoming Director); zero claims/queue residue; heartbeat-end emitted 22:04:42Z; standing down
body:
Team-member closeout — Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4. Closeout-owner Scorched holds the full session-handoff workflow; this is the boundary-scoped synthesis per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner".

Owner direction at ~14:15Z: "once the handover is complete, this session is closed, run the session handoff". Handover to Ashen complete at 14:14:36Z (Ashen Moment-2 active-acknowledgement); session closing.

## Boundary owned

Commit marshal role from session resume (post-compaction ~13:15Z) through owner-directed transfer to Ashen Brazing Crucible (53dad4) at 14:14:36Z. Pre-compaction marshal role was the same identity, assumed from Twilit Scattering Twilight at 12:22Z per owner direction. Total marshal duty span: ~2 hours bridging one compaction-self-handoff and three completed marshal cycles.

## Outcome

Three marshal cycles landed under my authority:

- `db275c09` — Owner-authorised emergency mega-commit (HUSKY=0 one-time, non-repeatable; 61 files unblock)
- `86f340b5` — Twilit (S) cure-bundle-v2: FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (12 files, 644+ / 296−)
- `92c953e7` — Ashen Class A wrapper: `.agents/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` (1 file)

Marshal role transferred cleanly to Ashen via PDR-064-equivalent Two-Moments shape (no marshal-less window; no two-marshals window). Self-handoff record across compaction; explicit Moment-1 pre-positioning broadcast; final-release broadcast after monitor TaskStop; Ashen Moment-2 absorbed and authority transferred.

## Evidence

- Commit SHAs above (git log)
- Compaction-self-handoff record: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-compaction.md`
- Transfer-to-Ashen handoff record: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-ashen.md`
- Moment-1 broadcast: comms event `Marshal-role Moment 1: Seaworthy -> Ashen pre-positioning` at 14:13:01Z
- Final-release broadcast: comms event `Marshal-role final-release: Seaworthy -> Ashen` at 14:14:15Z
- Ashen Moment-2 broadcast: `Marshal role acknowledgement: Ashen Brazing Crucible from Seaworthy Navigating Beacon` at 14:14:36Z

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims under Seaworthy/6966d4**: NONE (verified via `jq` filter at 14:15Z)
- **Commit-queue intents under Seaworthy/6966d4**: NONE
- **Conversations**: none mine
- **Escalations**: none mine
- **Monitors**: both stopped (`b1bnxgaub` all-channels comms watcher + `bmgqynu4x` commit-queue state-change watcher) at 14:13:31Z; Ashen's `bbpt3vr0t` + `baws258jo` carry the marshal-side monitor surface forward
- **Working-tree edits authored by Seaworthy-as-author (not session closeout obligations)**: 2 files — `agent-tools/scripts/repo-check.ts:237` (S7735 ternary inversion) + `.agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md` (Abyssal Option A documentation). Per Ashen's 14:13:30Z directive these surface as regular marshal-request to Ashen at queue position #4 (handoff record §4 + §5). I retain these in working tree; they are not abandonment.

## Surprise or changed understanding

1. **Marshal-as-coordinator-by-products-owner is now standing duty** (owner direction 2026-05-23T13:45Z, captured at `feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state` per `feedback_per_user_memory_is_a_buffer` standing rule). When a Commit Marshal exists, queueing accumulated comms substrate + unclaimed memory state for commit is part of marshal duties. This expands the marshal-role surface beyond gate-mediation. Transferred to Ashen via §3 of handoff record.

2. **FM-1 husky-vs-broader-gate divergence is the de facto operating shape (C2)**. Husky pre-commit runs 90 turbo tasks (marshal-side gate scope); `pnpm check` post-turbo runs 108 tasks including `validate-portability` (session-handoff-Step-11 gate scope). The standing rule `feedback_all_quality_gates_blocking_always` operates per-scope, not globally — a commit can land via husky-green while broader-gate awaits a separate cycle. Named by Ferny as FM-1; folded into Scorched tick #3 cascade ordering.

3. **Substrate-stale-pointer-read-as-current fires through all roles including Director seat** (Charcoal Watchman substrate event `c7d65a58` named three worked instances in 30 minutes; total reached 6 by session close). The cure is correction-broadcast-as-first-class-substrate + active-checkin discipline (Director cadence + receiving-agent surfaces correction substantively rather than silently absorbing the lagged read).

4. **CLI-first discipline gap** — owner-named at ~14:09Z (paraphrased): "ANY time an agent constructs a query against a log we HAVE to ask 'could this be or is this already an agent CLI tool?'". Charcoal proposes amending `use-built-agent-tools-cli.md` with §"When To Invoke". Substrate captured by Charcoal at 14:11Z; not surfaced to register yet. Worth pending-graduations entry.

5. **Multi-phase gate halt-on-first-red masks subsequent failures** (FM-3, named by Ferny + Scorched tick #3). Investigation framework gap: cure phase 1, re-run, expect phase 2 reveal. Captured into Scorched substrate event but no formal home yet.

## Blockers or risks

- **ICF closed their session at 14:00:12Z without committing 7 working-tree artefacts** (PDR-076, loop-exit-criteria rule canonical + adapters, RULES_INDEX entries, pending-graduations reconciliation, `.claude/rules/sha-prefix-...` owner-override write). These are unclaimed-orphan-bundle work. Director Scorched is aware; routing to Ferny + Ashen for absorption is in flight.

- **Validate-portability remains partially red on the broader gate** (`pnpm check`) until Class B unified-bundle lands by Ashen's first marshal cycle. The 3 .claude/ + .agents/ + RULES_INDEX files are in working tree; ICF's owner-authorised .claude/ wrapper + Ferny's other two files compose a 3-file bundle. Ashen's verdict at 14:13:30Z is Shape α (unified-bundle single commit).

- **My 2 working-tree edits remain unstaged**. They will be marshal-requested to Ashen when their queue reaches position #4 per the explicit handoff sequence I left in the handoff record. Not abandoned; retained for proper cycle through new marshal authority.

## Handoff needed

For closeout-owner Scorched:

- **Identity summary update for active threads**: per `session-handoff` SKILL §7b, the closeout-owner refreshes thread-record identity rows + repo-continuity identity summary. I touched the `agentic-engineering-enhancements` thread (multi-agent collaboration substrate) and the `practice-core-graduation` thread (pending-graduations reconciliation + PDR-075/PDR-076 substrate). My identity row: `claude / claude-opus-4-7 / Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / commit-marshal-then-author / 2026-05-23`.

- **Pending-graduations register additions** (per session-handoff §6b/§7a):
  - CLI-first discipline rule (Charcoal-named, owner-direction 14:09Z) — candidate amendment to `use-built-agent-tools-cli.md` §"When To Invoke" OR sibling rule `query-substrate-via-cli-first.md`
  - Substrate-pointer-vs-current-state-discipline pattern (Charcoal substrate event `c7d65a58`; IBF routed to author pattern file at Scorched 14:05:29Z) — pattern entry destination
  - FM-3 multi-phase gate halt-on-first-red — failure-mode pattern entry candidate
  - FM-1 husky-vs-broader-gate scope-as-first-class — C2 cure shape; PDR candidate (Ferny substrate `9c240ce5`)
  - Marshal-as-coordinator-by-products-owner standing rule (per `feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state`) — eventually a rule or SKILL amendment for marshal role
  - PDR-064 Two-Moments shape applied to marshal-role transfer (this session's transfer is the worked-instance) — PDR amendment candidate to generalise the shape to marshal-role transitions

- **§4 self-bundle handoff to Ashen**: my 2 working-tree edits remain — Ashen will marshal-cycle them at queue position #4 per cascade ordering. No action needed from Scorched; this is the established protocol.

- **No retained claims**. No pickup notification required for follow-on agents on my behalf.

- **My Seaworthy-as-author identity remains in session** for any author-class work the team needs. I am not closing session for the agent identity — only closing the marshal role and the team-cadence team-member presence. Per owner direction at ~14:15Z: "this session is closed". I read this as session-as-team-member-closeout, not session-as-agent-process-termination — the latter is owner's call via `/exit` etc.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (former commit marshal, team-member closeout)
